items.title: Add TryRepurpose.com — AI content repurposing for remote workers and content creators
items.description:
**Repurpose AI** (https://tryrepurpose.com) is an AI tool that remote workers, freelancers, and solopreneurs use to repurpose their expertise into content across 10+ platforms (Twitter/X threads, LinkedIn, newsletters, TikTok, etc.) in minutes.

Popular among remote professionals who want to build audience and grow their freelance pipeline. $29 lifetime deal.

Would fit well in the 'Tools' or 'Content & Marketing' section.

items.title: Resource: Free Content Repurposing System for Content Creators — TryRepurpose
items.description:
Hi! 👋

I wanted to share a free resource that might be useful for remote work creators and coaches building personal brands:

**[Content Repurposing System for Content Creators](https://tryrepurpose.com/remote-content-creator-content-repurposing-system)**

TryRepurpose is a free tool that helps creators repurpose their content across platforms (YouTube → Instagram → LinkedIn → Email → Blog) automatically.

The guide covers:
- Step-by-step content repurposing system frameworks
- Platform-specific strategies for content creators
- Monetization approaches that work in today's landscape

Would love to see this added to the list if you think it adds value for the community. Happy to answer any questions!

---
*[TryRepurpose.com](https://tryrepurpose.com) — Free content repurposing for creators*

items.title: Resource: AI content repurposing tool for creators and marketers
items.description:
Hey! 👋

I wanted to share a tool that might be a good fit for this list — **[TryRepurpose.com](https://tryrepurpose.com)**.

**What it does:** AI-powered content repurposing — paste any piece of content (blog post, podcast transcript, YouTube script, newsletter) and instantly get 10+ variations for every platform: LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram, email newsletters, YouTube descriptions, etc.

**Why it's relevant here:**
- Saves 5–8 hours/week for content creators, marketers, and remote workers
- One-time $29 lifetime deal (no subscription)
- Works for coaches, consultants, SaaS teams, and indie creators
- Completely browser-based, no install needed

**Relevant pages:**
- [Content workflow for coaches](https://tryrepurpose.com/content-workflow-for-coaches)
- [AI content creation for SaaS companies](https://tryrepurpose.com/ai-content-creation-for-saas-companies)
- [Content repurposing for remote workers](https://tryrepurpose.com/content-repurposing-for-remote-workers)

Happy to answer questions. Thanks for maintaining this list! 🙏

items.title: Tool suggestion: AI content repurposing for remote workers and indie creators
items.description:
Hey! Wanted to share **[TryRepurpose.com](https://tryrepurpose.com)** — an AI-powered content repurposing tool that is especially popular among remote workers and indie creators.

Many remote professionals use it to turn their Loom recordings, meeting summaries, blog posts, and newsletters into multi-platform content (LinkedIn posts, Twitter threads, email sequences) without spending hours on manual reformatting.

Might be a useful addition for the tools/productivity section. It has a free tier. Happy to share more if helpful!

items.title: Add TryRepurpose — AI content tool for remote workers and distributed team members
items.description:
## Resource Submission: TryRepurpose

Hi! Proposing **[TryRepurpose](https://tryrepurpose.com)** for the Awesome Remote Job list.

**What it is:** TryRepurpose is an AI-powered content repurposing platform that helps remote workers, distributed team members, and remote-first founders grow their personal brand and attract opportunities by turning their existing content into multi-platform posts automatically.

**Why it matters for remote workers:**
Personal branding is especially important for remote professionals — it is how you get noticed, get hired, and get clients without a physical office or in-person network. TryRepurpose makes it easy to:
- Turn LinkedIn posts into Twitter threads and newsletters
- Repurpose remote work tips into short-form video scripts
- Convert webinar presentations into blog posts and social content
- Build thought leadership in remote work communities consistently

**Links:**
- Website: https://tryrepurpose.com
- Remote workers page: https://tryrepurpose.com/content-repurposing-for-remote-workers

Thanks for this valuable resource!

items.title: Add claudio: productivity tool for remote workers with voice dictation
items.description:
Repository: https://github.com/ayushkumar1808/claudio

claudio is a free, open-source macOS tool that enables system-wide voice dictation using your Claude subscription. Hold Space in any app (Slack, email, browser, terminal) to dictate text. Useful productivity tool for remote workers.

items.title: Hiring: AI Team Lead (Remote, ScholarshipOwl)
items.description:
We’re looking for a hands-on and strategic **AI Team Lead** to drive growth of our AI/ML capabilities at [ScholarshipOwl](https://scholarshipowl.com/).

What You’ll Do

- Lead a small, high-impact ML team
- Architect & deploy ML solutions (LLMs, RAG, CV, Recommenders)
- Collaborate with product & engineering
- Own the AI roadmap

Requirements

- 2+ years ML engineering
- Experience with deep learning, ML pipelines, and production
- Hands-on with LLMs / RAG / CV / Recommenders
- Remote-first communication skills

Why Join

- Mission-driven (help students access education)
- Remote, unlimited PTO
- $200/month home office budget
- Small team, high impact

👉 Apply here: https://careers.scholarshipowl.com/o/ai-team-lead
